# yhile.com

yhile.com is a free collection of browser-based web tools.
Files never leave the user's device. No signup, no ads, 
no server uploads. Free forever.

## Tools
- MP4 to MP3 converter
- HEIC image converter
- Audio converter
- Photo collage maker
- Base64 encoder
- Image converter
- Decimal/Binary/Hex converter
- Repeated words checker
- Calculator
- Timer & Stopwatch

## About
Solo bootstrapped project. Privacy-focused. 
All processing happens client-side in the browser.
